AI tool that gives hints instead of full code to improve problem-solving
skills.
Supports multi-level hints (concept, logic, error direction) for learning.
Backend built with FastAPI + prompt control to prevent code output.
Designed to reduce AI dependency & cheating in coding education.

I am a second-year Computer Science Engineering (CSE - AIML Specialization)

interest in Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning.. I have worked on
projects involving AI-based automation, machine learning models, and

projects involving AI-based automation, machine learning models, and
intelligent systems, which helped me understand how AI can solve real-world
problems. I am currently focused on improving my AI/ML, data analysis, and
problem-solving skills while actively participating in hackathons and hands-on
projects.

projects.

data analytics.Built an ML regression model to estimate used car prices
Performed preprocessing & feature encoding
Developed an AI-based HR assistant that helps companies automate the
hiring process. The system can screen resumes, detect possible fraud in

hiring process. The system can screen resumes, detect possible fraud in
candidate information, rank applicants based on their skills, and conduct
AI-based interviews through text and voice. It analyzes candidate
responses using natural language processing and machine learning to
help HR teams identify the most suitable candidates and make faster,
more informed hiring decisions.

more informed hiring decisions.

Fast LearnerAutism Spectrum Detection using Machine Learning
Developed a machine learning model to assist in the early detection of
Autism Spectrum Disorder (ASD) by analyzing behavioral and screening
data. The system processes input features, applies predictive algorithms,
and classifies the likelihood of ASD, helping support early identification
and awareness.
